roa.docketEntryComment: SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
/CAL:STATUS OF DELIVERY/X:SFPD INSPECTOR ROBERT HART SPECIALLY APPEARING//X:DEFENSE ORAL REQUEST FOR RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED/CONTD:STATUS OF DELIVERY/

/CAL:FUGITIVE ARRAIGNMENT/X:SFPD FUGITIVE OFFICER ROBERT HART #568 IS ALSOPRESENT,/X:DEFENDANT IS ARRAIGNED ON THE FUGITIVE WARRANT FROM AUSTIN, TX, ADMITS IDENTIFICATION & WAIVES EXTRADITION,/CONTD:STATUS OF TEXAS DELIVERY ON 09-23-16/DOPU:DELIVERED TO TEXAS/

/CAL:FUGITIVE IDENTIFICATION HEARING/X: COURT HOLDS A HEARING PURSUANT TOPC 1551,2/X:SFDP OFFICER ROBERT HART PRESENT/WIT SWORN: EMILY SCHWARTZ, SFPD FINGERPRINT EXAMINER/EXHMA: 2 PAGE CERTIFIED DOCUMENT FROM HARRIS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE CONTAINING DEFENDANT'S MUG SHOT, FINGERPRINT CARD AND OTHER IDENTIFYING INFORMATION/X:COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT, JED HOLST, IS THE FUGITIVE FOR WHOM EXTRADITION IS BEING SOUGHT IN HOUSTON, TEXAS/DEF: DOES NOT WAIVE EXTRADITION/X:EVIDENCE ADMITTED AT HEARING RETAINED IN THE CLERK'S OFFICE/CONTD:STATUS OF POSSIBLE WAIVER OF EXTRADITION/DOP/
/CAL:FUGITIVE ARRAIGNMENT/PD/X:INSPECTOR ROBERT HART APPEARING/X:DEFENDANT WAIVES ARRAIGNMENT BUT DOES NOT ADMIT TO IDENTITY/CONTD:FUGITIVE IDENTIFICATION HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF DELIVERY/NP/X:SFPD INSPECTOR ROBERT HART APPEARING/MO PC 1385:DEFENDANT DELIVERED TO STATE OF TEXAS ON 09-25-16/
